children.heading: Authority
children.label: 1 Authority
children.text: The President may reduce the amount owed to the United States (or any agency of the United States) that is outstanding as of , as a result of concessional loans made to an eligible country by the United States under subchapter I of this chapter, part IV of subchapter II of this chapter, or predecessor foreign economic assistance legislation.January 1, 1998

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: A reduction of debt pursuant to this section shall not be considered assistance for purposes of any provision of law limiting assistance to a country.

children.heading: Additional requirement
children.label: B Additional requirement
children.text: The authority of this section may be exercised notwithstanding or section 321 of the International Development and Food Assistance Act of 1975.section 2370(r) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Any debt reduction pursuant to subsection (a) shall be accomplished at the direction of the Facility by the exchange of a new obligation for obligations of the type referred to in subsection (a) outstanding as of the date specified in subsection (a)(1).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Facility shall notify the agency primarily responsible for administering subchapter I of this chapter of an agreement entered into under paragraph (1) with an eligible country to exchange a new obligation for outstanding obligations.

children.heading: Additional requirement
children.label: B Additional requirement
children.text: At the direction of the Facility, the old obligations that are the subject of the agreement shall be canceled and a new debt obligation for the country shall be established relating to the agreement, and the agency primarily responsible for administering subchapter I of this chapter shall make an adjustment in its accounts to reflect the debt reduction.

children.label: A
children.text: The provisions relating to repayment of principal under .section 2430d of this title

children.label: B
children.text: The provisions relating to interest on new obligations under .section 2430e of this title

In addition to the application of the provisions relating to repayment of principal under to the reduction of debt under subsection (a)(1) (in accordance with paragraph (1)(A) of this subsection), repayment of principal on a new obligation established under subsection (b) may be made in the local currency of the beneficiary country and deposited in the Conservation Fund of the country in the same manner as the provisions relating to payment of interest on new obligations under .section 2430d of this titlesection 2430e of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations for fiscal years after fiscal year 2001
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations for fiscal years after fiscal year 2001

children.heading: Use of funds to conduct program audits, evaluations, monitoring, and administration
children.label: e Use of funds to conduct program audits, evaluations, monitoring, and administration
children.text: Of the amounts made available to carry out this subchapter for a fiscal year, $300,000 is authorized to be made available to carry out audits, evaluations, monitoring, and administration of programs under this subchapter, including personnel costs associated with such audits, evaluations, monitoring and administration.
